text.div:
This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include all codes defined in https://gematik.de/fhir/directory/CodeSystem/TIPractitionerProfessionOidCS
  • Include all codes defined in http://ihe-d.de/ValueSets/IHEXDSauthorSpeciality

name: TIPractitionerQualificationVS
title: Qualification of a Practitoner
description: ValueSet of all Practitoner.qualification.code in the gematik FHIR Directory
